relations.note: Cardinality limit applies alongside the CTA button styling spec.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Ensure seamless section assembly and responsive collapse on a fixed email canvas.
rules.rule_text: Email body width is fixed at 600px (size.canvas.email_body_width_600 = 600px), centered; sections render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.mobile.480 = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to a single column. The internal section grid uses a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

quotes: Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless)
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Preserve consistent vertical rhythm and zero-gap section assembly.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px (padding.section.side_24 = 24px) left/right, consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless. Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects the 24px insets. All padding/margins are multiples of the 8px base unit (spacing.base.8 = 8px). Each section owns its own top AND bottom internal padding of 32px (padding.section.top_bottom_32 = 32px); there are no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking. Standard gaps: heading → body 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body_16), paragraph → paragraph 16px, body → callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout_24), image → caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Maintain approved, accessible CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue fill (cta.button.fill = #00529b) with White label text (cta.button.label.color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px (cta.button.padding), a fully-rounded pill corner radius of 24px (cta.button.radius), and a minimum touch target of 48px height (size.touch_target.min_height = 48px) per the brand accessibility rule (≥48px clickable areas). The Secondary CTA uses a White background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.secondary_cta.brand_blue_2px) and Brand Blue text, with the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Avoid competing calls to action within a section.
rules.rule_text: A maximum of one primary CTA is allowed per section.
